title: Lorraine's Graham Cracker Pudding
description: A no-bake layered icebox dessert of graham crackers, vanilla and chocolate pudding, peanut butter, and Cool Whip, chilled until the crackers soften.
instructions: Prepare the puddings according to package instructions. Prepare the vanilla pudding and set aside.
Spread peanut butter on the graham crackers. Place the first layer of graham cracker/peanut butter on the bottom of a 9x13 pan (peanut butter side up).
Spread ⅓ of the vanilla pudding on top of that.
Spread a layer of Cool Whip (works best if soft) on top of the vanilla pudding.
Continue layering in order as above.
Layer until there's just enough room to spread chocolate pudding on top as a finish (use chocolate pudding to top the dessert only).
Crush the remaining graham crackers. Sprinkle them over the chocolate pudding for garnish.
Refrigerate 1-2 hours or until the graham crackers are soft.

notes.text: You can use any flavor graham cracker and any flavor pudding you wish. Cinnamon crackers with cream cheese pudding is great.
You can also make the puddings from scratch if you prefer, but that requires more effort and time — this is the quick version.
